artPrompt: A severe goblin assassin standing tall, an enormous ledger clasped to her chest, one clawed finger marking a name, her eyes lit by a single sliver of amber lamp while her gown bleeds into ink-black at the base of the frame. Cigar smoke and rain coil around her, all menace held in stillness. A keeper of debts and grudges, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Madam Vendetta, the Grudge-Keeper
text:
Deathtouch, menace
Whenever an opponent who owes you a Favor loses life, you draw a card.
{B}, Sacrifice a Favor token: Destroy target creature controlled by the player who owed that Favor. She keeps the grudges in a little book. The little book is full.
flavorText: She forgives nothing and forgets less. The ledger is also a hit list. There is no second column.
